channel.title: Home on Kanagawa Institute of Technology, Smart House Research Center
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Kanagawa Institute of Technology, Smart House Research Center

item.title: Announcement of price update for IOT(Inter-operability Testing) at HEMS (ECHONET Lite) Certification Support Center
item.description: The price update for IOT(Inter-operability Testing) at HEMS (ECHONET Lite) Certification Support Center on June 1st 2026.

item.title: Dr. Sukumal, Dr. Kalika and Prof. Umejima visited KAIT
item.description: Thai National Casecert Univ. Dr. Sukumal, Thai National Electric Computer Technology Research Center Dr. Kalika and Prof. Umejima visited KAIT.

item.title: Mr. 謝群相(Taiwan ETC) and Professor 胡誌麟(Taiwan National Central University) visited us
item.description: On Aug. 20th 2025, Mr. 謝群相(Taiwan ETC) and Professor 胡誌麟(National Central University) visited us

item.title: Report about ENEX2025 Exhibition
item.description: For three days from Wednesday, January 29 to Friday, January 31, 2025, the Smart House Research Center of Kanagawa Institute of Technology exhibited at ENEX2025, held at Tokyo Big Sight, in joint sponsorship with the Echonet Consortium, together with companies that regularly utilize the HEMS Certification Support Center.

item.title: A mutual cooperation and collaboration agreement with the College of Electrical Engineering and Computer Science and the Institute of Energy Engineering at National Central University
item.description: A mutual cooperation and collaboration agreement was concluded with the College of Electrical Engineering and Computer Science and the Institute of Energy Engineering at National Central University.

item.title: Bus Time Table at Honatsugi Station(weekday): revised on 2026.04.01
item.description:
To Kanagawa Institute of Technology

EXPRESS To Kanagawa Institute of Technology (厚67)

  • No operation through Feb 15th ~ Mar 25th and Aug 8th ~ Sep 19th (exact date may vary).
  • Bus Stop: #2 bus stop at Atsugi Bus Center
HH MM
08 20 25 30 35 38 41 44 47 50 53 56 59
09 02
10 30 45 50 55
11 00
12 00
13 00

To Atsugi Kyodo Museum via Kanagawa Institute of Technology (厚07) To Tobio Apartment via Kanagawa Institute of Technology (厚89)

item.title: Consultation
item.description: We provide technical consultation about ECHONET Lite.

item.title: Documents
item.description:
• HEMS (ECHONETLite) Certification Support Center Pamphlet
  • Book: Introduction of ECHONET Lite
  • Equipment List for Inter-operability Test:2025.03.21
  • Booklet for the 10th anniversary (high resolution edition)
  • Booklet for the 10th anniversary (low resolution edition)

item.title: Inter-Operability Testing
item.description: Various ECHONET Lite–compatible devices are installed within the Smart House Research Center to build an interoperability testing environment. This environment is used not only for in-house research but is also made available to external users. In particular, the room equipped with smart electricity meters from electric power companies across Japan constitutes a unique testing environment within the country.

item.title: SDK
item.description:
Documents

  • ECHONET Lite Tutorial (Ver. 20191111)
    • A Tutorial based on the offical documents by ECHONET Consortium
    • Download from here

Tools

  • Device Emulator
    • An emulator such as airconditioner, lighting and controller
    • OS：Windows, MacOS, Linux
    • Link to GitHub
  • SSNG (Node.js version)
    • A tool to send ECHONET Lite packet
    • This can be used to check ECHONET Lite devices
    • OS：Windows, MacOS, Linux
    • Link to GitHub
  • SSNG (iOS)
    • A tool to send ECHONET Lite packet
    • This can be used to check ECHONET Lite devices
    • OS：Windows, MacOS, Linux
    • Link to App Store
  • Appendix Viewer
    • MRA(Machine Readable Appendix) Viewer
    • OS：Windows, MacOS, Linux
    • Link to GitHub

Middleware

  • echonet-lite: module for Node.js by Hiroshi Sugimura
    • Link to npm
  • node-echonet-lite: module for Node.js by Futomi Hatano
    • Link to GitHub
  • ELSwift: library for Swift by Hiroshi Sugimura
    • Link to GitHub

Apps

  • EL Lighting: A controller for iOS by Hiroshi Sugimura
    • A controller for ECHONET Lite lighting
    • OS: iOS (iPhone and iPad)
    • Link to App Store
  • EL AirConditioner: A controller for iOS by Hiroshi Sugimura
    • A controller for ECHONET Lite airconditioner
    • OS: iOS (iPhone and iPad)
    • Link to App Store
